description_long: This is an adult male figure standing upright, wearing a casual zip-up jacket with a gradient effect on the sleeves and a visible undershirt. The figure has cropped pants with side pockets and is wearing open-toed flip-flops. The head is adorned with a stylized, spiky mask or helmet that covers the entire face, giving a distinctive and somewhat intimidating appearance. The arms and legs are proportionate, and the hands are relaxed at the sides. The overall attire and accessories suggest a relaxed, urban streetwear style suitable for everyday city environments.
description: A standing adult male in casual streetwear, featuring a zip-up jacket, cropped pants, flip-flops, and a spiky full-face mask.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full-face spiky mask, zip-up jacket, undershirt, cropped pants, and flip-flops.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the jacket's sleeve gradient and the profile of the mask and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, pants, and the spiky hairstyle or mask from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the sleeve gradient and the mask's side profile.
attribute_clothing_type: casual zip-up jacket, undershirt, cropped pants
